title: [CI:BUILD] rpm: use go-rpm-macros on RHEL 10
body:
The macros in ELN and c10s have the necessary support.

c10s scratch build: https://kojihub.stream.rdu2.redhat.com/koji/taskinfo?taskID=3418218

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
@yselkowitz please add `[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]` in the commit message body to have the `Validate..` tasks pass. I think it would be good to have `[CI:BUILD]` in the commit messsage title to have only the relevant build tests run.

Diff itself is good to go.
@yselkowitz please feel free to commit this to fedora dist-git right away. Syncing from here to Fedora won't be before the next release.
